Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Skysworn]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — The Skysworn do not intervene in petty clan squabbles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — The Skysworn are a group that Cassias believes will not allow certain actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The Skysworn are currently investigating the Arelius family for negligence due to anonymous reports.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — The Skysworn are a group that Renfei belongs to.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — The Skysworn brought Lindon to his current location directly after leaving Serpent's Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — The Skysworn are keeping Lindon under observation rather than arresting him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — The Skysworn wear green plate armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — The Skysworn used a Thousand-Mile Cloud to carry people to the mountain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — The Skysworn is a sect within the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Skysworn is a group/rank.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — The Skysworn are a group of warriors who guard the outer door.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan's plan was to get Jai Daishou to incriminate himself in front of the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — The Skysworn have arrived.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — The Skysworn are a group of sacred artists dedicated to preserving justice and the rule of law.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — The Skysworn will jump to take people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — The Skysworn serve the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — The Skysworn are going sword-to-sword with Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — The Skysworn are an elite group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — The Skysworn have a city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — The Skysworn is a group that Eithan is attempting to influence by linking Underlords to them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — The Skysworn are a group that has students and a Soulsmith library.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — The Skysworn are protectors who serve the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Skysworn trainees are welcomed in a ceremony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — The Skysworn do not like Blackflames very much.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — The Skysworn struggled onto his cloud, kneeling on it and flying over to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — The Skysworn may consider Lindon and Yerin to be wanted for capture.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — The Skysworn are wandering judges empowered by the Empire to punish criminals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — The Skysworn are a group that recognizes Enkai's defense of the town.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — An apprentice Skysworn stood alone in the midst of black flames.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — The Skysworn are a group that Eithan left Lindon and his companions with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — The Skysworn are responding to reports of a disturbance around the facility.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — The Skysworn lent Lindon the Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — The Skysworn held Yerin back from passing through the portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — The Skysworn are working with Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — The Skysworn will ask for Lindon's permission to speak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — The dragons came from the Blackflame Empire with the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — The Underlady mentions the Skysworn and their Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon serves on a Skysworn squad.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan wants to join the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — The Skysworn are a group over which no additional authority is to be granted.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — The Skysworn are an organization with agents throughout the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — The Skysworn include Truegolds and trainees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — The Skysworn use Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Skysworn are a group of people on the cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — The Skysworn are a group mentioned by Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Skysworn are warriors who wear green armor and possess Truegold souls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — The Skysworn possess a flying city called Stormrock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Skysworn uses identical rooms in the tower for various purposes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — The Skysworn devastated Eithan's partners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan wears emerald Skysworn armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has been doing missions for the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — There are small Skysworn squads present.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — The Skysworn have caught up to Lindon's group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The Skysworn patrol the border of the Blackflame Empire's territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Skysworn are under attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — A Skysworn distress signal was being received.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — The Skysworn got away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — The Skysworn provide scouting missions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — The Skysworn have better rooms than trainees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon can send messages to the Skysworn using his communication construct.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Stormrock is a Skysworn city.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Captain Naru Gwei sees to the leadership of the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon and Yerin worked for the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Skysworn are a group coordinating the Blackflame Empire's forces.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
